holdings_sync.last_mutation_summary: upsert_absolute import applied for ibkr_multistrat: 1 upserts, 0 deletes

lanes.label: Publish Only
lanes.description: Republish already-current cached serving payloads without recomputing analytics.

lanes.label: Source Daily
lanes.description: Pull latest source-of-truth data locally, publish the retained operating window, and rebuild serving caches.

lanes.label: Source Daily + Core If Due
lanes.description: Daily source refresh plus a core recompute only when cadence or policy says it is due.

lanes.label: Core Weekly
lanes.description: Recompute factor returns, covariance, and specific risk from the current authoritative rebuild store.

lanes.label: Cold Core
lanes.description: Structural rebuild of raw history and core model state from the current authoritative rebuild store.

lanes.label: Universe Add
lanes.description: Post-universe-onboarding serving refresh after targeted source backfills.

runtime.source_authority_plain_english: Neon is the current authoritative core-read backend.
runtime.local_archive_plain_english: The local SQLite archive is the only place LSEG can land directly. It remains available for ingest, deep history, and intentional Neon retention expansion.
runtime.rebuild_authority_plain_english: Core rebuild lanes are configured to read from Neon after source sync.
runtime.diagnostics_scope_plain_english: Detailed diagnostics are local-instance diagnostics. Operator status, refresh state, holdings dirty state, and Neon mirror/parity health are the live operator truth surfaces.
warnings: Neon auto-sync is disabled; parity artifacts and mirror health will only update on manual Neon sync.
Neon auto-parity is disabled; post-run parity evidence will be incomplete.
Neon auto-prune is disabled; retained history may exceed the cloud retention window.
